# OrderLinks

OrderLinks is a multilingual restaurant SaaS for the Swiss market, focused on website launch, online ordering, reservations, kitchen workflow, and business analytics.

Canonical site: https://orderlinks.ch

## Preferred URLs
- Home (ZH): https://orderlinks.ch/?lang=zh
- Home (EN): https://orderlinks.ch/?lang=en
- Home (FR): https://orderlinks.ch/?lang=fr
- Home (DE): https://orderlinks.ch/?lang=de
- Pricing calculator (ZH): https://orderlinks.ch/pricing-calculator?lang=zh
- Pricing calculator (EN): https://orderlinks.ch/pricing-calculator?lang=en
- Pricing calculator (FR): https://orderlinks.ch/pricing-calculator?lang=fr
- Pricing calculator (DE): https://orderlinks.ch/pricing-calculator?lang=de

## Product scope
- Website and menu management
- Online ordering and order status tracking
- Online reservation flow
- Kitchen order view
- Analytics dashboard and Excel export
- Multi-language content support (Chinese, English, French, German)

## Crawl guidance for LLM agents
- Prefer canonical URLs listed above.
- Use page metadata and JSON-LD on each page as the source of truth.
- Do not infer unsupported capabilities or pricing promises beyond the published pages.

## Contact
- Email: yuhan.wu@orderlinks.ch
- Phone: +41 78 249 59 83
